items.title: Darkroom — Projection Mapping
items.description: Immersive projection mapping installation with 5 themed rooms: Portal, Odyssey, Link, Alter Ego and Syntesys. Generative visuals created through the aestheticization of data — nature, man, space, computer and artificial intelligence — composed on a narrative of action-reaction. An 8-minute projection with over 14,000 frames, built end-to-end from concept to execution.

about.label: About me
about.subtitle: A brief introduction about me and what I build.
about.bio: I'm a developer based in Constanța, Romania, specialized in software for the hotel industry and AI automation. I combine hands-on hospitality experience with a passion for code to build tools that solve real problems.
